title: OCX project configuration (ocx.toml)
description: Schema for OCX project files. Tools are declared by binding name and resolved to OCI registry identifiers; resolved digests are pinned separately in ocx.lock.

tools.title: Tool bindings
tools.description: Map of binding name to an OCI identifier. Example: go-task = "ocx.sh/go-task:latest".

group.title: Tool groups
group.description: Named groups of tool bindings (e.g. [group.ci]). Each group maps binding names to OCI identifiers.

identifier.title: OCI identifier
identifier.description: An OCI reference of the form registry/repository[:tag][@sha256:<digest>], e.g. "ocx.sh/nodejs:24" or "ocx.sh/go-task@sha256:…". A registry/repository path is required (a bare tag is not a valid identifier).
